name: Investview, Inc.
business: Investview operates a diversified series of business units including a direct-to-consumer marketing platform that sells financial education products, health/beauty/wellness products, and other services through a global network of independent distributors; an early-stage online retail brokerage platform; and a bitcoin mining operation.

exposures.sentence: Our Conectiv unit markets its financial tools, content, products, and travel benefits through a network of independent distributors located both within and outside the United States using a direct sales model.

Through our wholly owned subsidiary, SAFETek, LLC, we operate a vertically integrated, sustainability-focused blockchain infrastructure business specializing in Bitcoin mining and transaction validation.

In October 2024, we entered the over-the-counter health, beauty, and wellness market when our subsidiary, myLife Wellness Company ( myLife Wellness ), acquired the business of Renu Laboratories, Inc. ( Renu Labs ), a contract developer and manufacturer, producing both proprietary and non-proprietary health, beauty, and wellness products for our wholly owned subsidiary myLife Wellness, LLC and third-party clients.

Two such opportunities presented themselves when the Company, during October 2025 and March 2026, invested an aggregate of $3.25 million in a special purpose vehicle organized by Dream Ventures LLC, which participated in exempt private placements in an early-stage enterprise developing next generation nuclear power and infrastructure technologies.

catalysts.event: Opencash expected to enter market as early as Q2 2026
catalysts.sentence: We believe these efforts will position Opencash to enter the market as early as the second quarter of 2026 with a modern, customer-first brokerage model built around low-cost, commission-free trading.

catalysts.event: Stock repurchase program extended to March 31, 2027
catalysts.sentence: The stock repurchase program was extended to cover the repurchase of shares of the Company s common stock through March 31, 2027.

catalysts.event: Appeal of UOKiK decision filed February 2026
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company timely filed an appeal of UOKiK s administrative decision with Poland s Court of Competition and Consumer Protection.
